name: /doctor --explain reports effective severity off for a rule that is defined in metadata but not present in the active profile rules block
command: mkdir -p profiles && printf 'rules: {}\n' > profiles/p.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/doctor.sh" --explain no-eval --profile profiles/p.yaml 2>out.txt && grep -q 'effective_severity=off' out.txt && grep -q 'source=default' out.txt && grep -q 'rule_will_run=false' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
